prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical anime-style illustration of a glamorous young female belly dancer in an ornate cool-toned costume, shown in a dramatic close-up cropped composition from upper thighs to head area, with the face and central upper body intentionally covered by a large opaque gray rectangular censor block. The palette is dominated by deep navy, teal, aqua, silver, and pale icy blue. She has long flowing ash brown hair with soft curls spilling across the right side, decorated with delicate silver chains, tiny blue flower charms, dangling beads, and jeweled head ornaments. Her outfit is an intricate fantasy belly dancer costume: a dark navy fitted bodice, sheer turquoise veils wrapping around the shoulders and arms, layered translucent ruffles, white lace trim, and a richly decorated arm sleeve covered in silver filigree, pearls, oval metal coins, blue gemstones, floral motifs, and geometric diamond panels. Include a large pale blue fabric flower with a round silver medallion center on the upper left, flowing gauzy scarves, scattered coin ornaments, small pink triangular accents on the veil, and a dark flowing skirt at the bottom. Her hand appears near the lower center with delicate fingers and pale nails. Use an elegant high-detail digital painting style with smooth shading, crisp linework, glossy jewel highlights, ornate textile patterns, fantasy illustration polish, soft lighting, and a refined luxurious mood. The composition should feel intimate and decorative, with dense ornamental detail filling the frame and no background text.
